activator.description: Optional global activator for chorded shortcuts

hotkey.description: Toggle hotkey when always_on is false

device.description: sounddevice input device index, null for system default

type_into_focused_window.description: Whether the STT engine also types the dictated text into the focused window

voice_triggers_enabled.description: Whether the STT engine scans phrases for shortcut trigger words

llm.description: LLM fact-checker / concept explainer configuration (OpenAI-compatible). The API key is read from the environment variable named by api_key_env; it is never stored in this file.

base_url.description: Base URL of an OpenAI-compatible /v1/chat/completions endpoint (e.g. https://api.openai.com/v1, https://api.deepseek.com/v1, http://localhost:11434/v1)

model.description: Model name to send in the request

api_key_env.description: Name of the environment variable holding the API key

persona.description: Built-in persona preset. Use 'custom' to provide your own system_prompt.

system_prompt.description: Override the persona's system prompt. Required when persona is 'custom'.

toggle_hotkey.description: Global press-to-toggle hotkey for the fact-checker

silence_timeout.description: Seconds of silence (no new STT phrase) after which the fact-checker auto-sends the buffered question. Measured from the LAST phrase (not from toggle press). Set >= timeout_seconds to require explicit toggle-to-send.

esc_hotkey.description: Hotkey that aborts an in-flight LLM stream. The toggle hotkey does NOT cancel mid-stream (so the user doesn't accidentally kill the answer they asked for). Set to null to disable.

suffix.description: Suffix keys captured sequentially after activator (single string or array)

trigger_word.description: When STT transcribes a phrase containing this word (case-insensitive, word-boundary match), the shortcut fires. Set to null or omit to disable voice triggering for this shortcut.

trigger_phrases.description: List of multi-word phrases. When STT transcribes a phrase that contains a candidate phrase as a contiguous, case-insensitive, word-boundary subsequence, the shortcut fires.

fact_check.description: Reserved for v1.1: when True, this shortcut can be bound to a fact-check trigger. v1 uses a single global toggle hotkey defined in the 'llm' block.

width.description: Overlay width in pixels (optional, uses original if not set)

height.description: Overlay height in pixels (optional, uses original if not set)
